name: gowth-mem
description: Persistent topic-organized memory for Claude Code. Global ~/.gowth-mem/ synced across machines via your own git remote. v3.4 = hook consolidation (subagent-skip, settings-tunable cadence), tag-aware FTS5 (indexed tag column + cross-file SHA-1 dedup wired into write paths), /mem-dream wraps Light/REM/Deep consolidation, /mem-recall slash command. v3.3 baseline: deterministic-only retrieval (FTS5 BM25 + char-ngram Jaccard), 4-tier context planner, rtk-style compression, heuristic contradiction lint. Multi-session safe via fcntl locks, AI-mediated conflict resolution, SM-2 spaced resurfacing, mem0 ADD/UPDATE/DELETE/NOOP write semantics.
